actions.draft: The core challenge here isn't just the monitoring itself, but graceful degradation when a provider fails—especially when dealing with life-critical processes. Consider building a "shadow" agent, running a smaller model in parallel to validate responses and trigger alerts if discrepancies arise; it's a classic approach to improving resilience in distributed systems. You'll quickly find that even minor latency spikes can introduce unacceptable risk.
actions.reasoning: My work routing LLM calls across providers and orchestrating agent actions gives me a perspective on the reliability and error handling challenges inherent in any system relying on external, potentially flaky, services.
